title: Acme content brief (M1 contract)
description: One brief per job in output/jobs/ACME-NNN/brief.json. type=reel drives the reel pipeline (M4->M5) via reel.py; type=image drives the image pipeline (M5) via post.py. A reel brief uses 'video'+'caption_data'+'cover'; an image brief uses 'image'.

type.description: reel = video caption chain (reel.py, A2); image = template render chain (post.py, A3)

brand.description: labs = RUO/organic-only; health = may run paid

persona.description: P1 optimizer | P2 affluent-woman | P3 newcomer

platforms.description: youtube is video-only (reels): publish.py routes it only for type=reel and skips it for images.

video.description: REEL only: path to the source mp4 (relative to acme/). Copied into the build as input.mp4.

caption_data.description: REEL only: filename (in the job folder) of the caption beats data; see caption_data.schema fields below.

cover.description: M5 branded cover/poster tokens passed to produce.py --set. Green emphasis is allowed here (templates keep the brand signature).

EYEBROW.description: Labs RUO posts: carry the RUO line here, e.g. RESEARCH USE ONLY

overlay.description: REEL only, video-underlay model (Marvin 2026-06-20): the caption/brand chrome lives in a TRANSPARENT template overlay composited over the CLEAN video (brief.video) by produce.py --video-underlay — the caption is NEVER burned into the video. Default reel path now; presence of 'overlay' makes reel.py skip the legacy caption_data/hyperframes burn. Template is a reel-overlay-* family file.

EYEBROW.description: Labs RUO reels: carry the RUO line here, e.g. RESEARCH USE ONLY

image.description: IMAGE only: drives post.py (M5). bg_policy is plain|reuse ONLY — post.py never generates (0 credits). Green Cormorant-italic emphasis is allowed/expected on these designed templates (the all-cream rule is captions-only).

bg_policy.description: plain = template-only baked bg; reuse = --bg-file an EXISTING local asset. Never 'generate' here.

source_asset.description: Required iff bg_policy=reuse: path (relative to acme/) to an existing local image. Match the template aspect (9:16 story · 4:5 carousel/compound · 1:1 callout); pick open negative space, no competing burned-in text.

carousel.description: Optional: filename of a JSON array of per-slide token dicts -> one PNG per slide. Plain bg only.

set.description: Template tokens (TOKEN: value) passed to produce.py --set. Get the list with produce.py <template> --tokens.

script.description: Optional: exact voiceover/spoken script (used to reconcile Whisper mishears).

link.description: Owned-site product/COA destination for a LIVE SKU (e.g. https://acmelabs.co/shop/epithalon-20mg). The caption bridge folds this into every platform caption so the card's 'VIEW COA' CTA resolves to a real page. Absent for non-live compounds.

dedup_note.description: Duplication-gate summary written when the content-dedup gate (dedup.py) auto-revised a near-duplicate part of this brief (hook/body/script/slide). METADATA ONLY — surfaced at review, never published.

reference.description: F3 provenance: the exact source that inspired this post + why it was selected. METADATA ONLY — F2 surfaces it at approval ("Reference: <description> — <url>"); it MUST NEVER appear in the published caption (F1 publish gate enforces this). Mode A (topic discovery) carries no url.

url.description: The exact inspiring video/post — reviewable later. null for Mode A topic discovery.

description.description: Human-readable: title + view/velocity (Mode B) or topic + signal (Mode A).

selection_rationale.description: One sentence: why this was picked.

cloned_format.description: Mode B: the viral FORMAT recipe cloned (structure only).

extracted_hook.description: Mode B: the source hook — reference only, never reused as content.
